title: I built my own trading journal because I was tired of $30/month subscriptions — here's what I made
author: gptradingclub
selftext:
After years of using overpriced tools, I decided to build my own trading journal. It's a single HTML file that runs 100% offline.



What it tracks:

\- P&L: daily, weekly, monthly and yearly

\- Long & Short trades separately  

\- Win rate, profit factor, avg trade, max drawdown

\- Equity curve (last 30 trades)

\- Up to 10 accounts (perfect for prop firms)

\- Goal tracker to $1M with milestones



No subscriptions. No cloud. Your data stays on your computer forever.



One-time $29. Happy to answer any questions.



Link: [https://gptradingclub.github.io/trader-tracker/TraderTrackerPro\_Sales\_Page.html](https://gptradingclub.github.io/trader-tracker/TraderTrackerPro_Sales_Page.html)
